page: Microsoft Azure M128bds_v3 is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an Intel Xeon 8473C processor. Operating under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, it features 128 dedicated vCPUs derived from 64 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled. The system operates at a clock speed of 4.0 GHz and is equipped with a 105 MB L3 cache. It includes 1024.0 GB of system memory, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per physical core. Local storage consists of a 410 GB disk, and the server is premium storage capable.

Benchmark evaluations place this server in the top tier for memory bandwidth, achieving 9007.9 GB/sec for cached small-block reads and 433.69 GB/sec for uncached large-block reads. Multi-threaded performance is strong, with a PassMark CPU score of 106,632.43 and a multi-threaded bzip3 decompression rate of 678.59 GB/sec. The processor's advanced instruction sets, including AVX-512 and AMX (Advanced Matrix Extensions), contribute to top-tier performance in encryption tests and database operations, the latter reaching 34,375.01 operations in PassMark. Redis SET operations perform exceptionally well at 138.18 million operations per second.

Given its high resource density, featuring 1 TB of RAM and 128 vCPUs, the M128bds_v3 represents a high-end hardware class designed for demanding enterprise workloads. The absence of a GPU makes it less suitable for heavy deep learning training, but its AMX support enables strong CPU-based LLM inference, processing 247.25 tokens per second on medium 7B models. The server is highly optimized for large-scale in-memory databases, heavy database operations, high-throughput web serving, and memory-intensive enterprise applications.
description: The Microsoft Azure M128bds_v3 is a memory-optimized server built on the x86_64 architecture and powered by an Intel Xeon 8473C processor running at 4.0 GHz. Operating under Microsoft Hyper-V, it delivers 128 dedicated vCPUs across 64 physical cores, paired with 1024.0 GB of system memory and a 410 GB local disk. Designed for high-density enterprise workloads, the server excels in memory-intensive tasks, demonstrating top-tier memory bandwidth of 433.69 GB/sec for uncached large blocks and exceptional database performance, including 138.18 million Redis SET operations per second. While it lacks a dedicated GPU, its support for Intel AMX and AVX-512 instruction sets enables strong CPU-based LLM inference and cryptographic execution. This configuration is highly suited for large-scale in-memory databases, complex data processing, and high-throughput enterprise applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M128bds_v3 is a memory-optimized server featuring 128 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, and a 410 GB local disk, delivering top-tier memory bandwidth and database performance for enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure M128bds_v3 is a memory-optimized server with 128 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, and top-tier database and memory bandwidth performance.
tagline: A high-density, memory-optimized platform delivering exceptional memory bandwidth and database performance for demanding enterprise-scale workloads.
bullet_points: 128 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs operating at 4.0 GHz
1024 GB of system memory with top-tier read/write bandwidth
410 GB of local storage with premium storage capability
Intel AMX and AVX-512 support for accelerated cryptography and AI inference
Optimized for large-scale in-memory databases and Redis deployments
